---
title: "James Batten Coulthard"
---

## James Batten Coulthard

**Dates:** (b.1785/6)

### Description

maternal grandfather of Frances (Walter) Yonge

### Biography

He was the father of  father of Mary Emma, James Batten and Frances Charlotte Hilare Coulthard.  Deirdre Le Faye, <i>Jane Austen’s Letters</i>, 511, calls him James Battin Coulthard (1782-1856).  The Mrs Coulthard whom Jane Austen called (11 April 1805), 99, ‘a good-hearted, friendly woman’, was, Le Faye thinks, his stepmother Frances Barlow (1764-1829), who married his father Thomas Coulthard (1756-1811) in 1784. Perhaps there was some connection with Hilare Barlow (d.1757), second wife of the first Earl Nelson, who subsequently (1837) married Austen’s nephew George Thomas Knight .  [1841 census]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
